assertions.assertion: Output contains a call to builder.Services.AddIdentityServer with an options lambda
assertions.rationale: Code contains `builder.Services.AddIdentityServer(options => { ... })` with an options lambda.

assertions.assertion: Output enables all four event types: RaiseErrorEvents, RaiseInformationEvents, RaiseFailureEvents, RaiseSuccessEvents all set to true
assertions.rationale: All four event types are explicitly set to true.

assertions.assertion: Output calls AddInMemoryIdentityResources with at least IdentityResources.OpenId() and IdentityResources.Profile()
Output calls AddInMemoryApiScopes with a scope named 'weatherapi'
Output calls app.UseIdentityServer() and does NOT separately call app.UseAuthentication()
assertions.rationale: Uses `app.UseAuthentication()` instead of `app.UseIdentityServer()`. This is the Duende-specific middleware call that the without_skill variant misses.
